top_signals.title: Policy paper: Oxford-Cambridge Growth Corridor Investment Prospectus
top_signals.summary: The Investment Prospectus sets out some of the investment opportunities that make the Corridor and the UK a dynamic and exciting place to invest.

top_signals.title: ISIS leader killed in Africa as US commander raises force reduction concerns
top_signals.summary: Despite recent operations, U.S. force reduction moves have ignited concerns over America's ability to stifle terror plots emanating from the continent.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
